filter_report.acceptance_rate_note: accepted_percentage = frames_accepted_pre_augmentation / frames_total (sampled). frames_exported_including_augmentations includes augmentation duplicates.
filter_report.quality_score_formula: Per frame: frame_quality_score = 0.5 * avg_landmark_visibility + 0.0 * lower_body_visibility + 0.5 * motion_local.

documentation.sequence_quality_score: Sequence quality_score uses motion_consistency from hip displacement series.
documentation.per_frame_scores: Per frame: frame_quality_score = 0.5 * avg_landmark_visibility + 0.0 * lower_body_visibility + 0.5 * motion_local.
